title: Fantastic Roasted Mediterranean Pasta
description: A dense and comforting Mediterranean dish featuring paccheri pasta and confit-tomato, high in protein and perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe is a hearty and flavorful twist on traditional pasta dishes.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the paccheri pasta according to package instructions until al dente, then set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the confit-tomato, kalamata olives, artichoke hearts, and feta cheese.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat and cook the chicken breast until browned and cooked through.
Add the garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss to combine with the chicken and spices.
In a large baking dish, combine the pasta mixture and the confit-tomato mixture.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
